title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE's DJ VIDEO🎧
【spring high】

今回は春の訪れを感じるような選曲でお届け。
春風のように爽やかな楽曲から、日に日に春めいていく季節の高揚感を映し出すような熱量のある楽曲まで、幅広いセレクトをお楽しみください。

This time, we bring you a selection of songs that evoke the arrival of spring.
From refreshing tracks like a spring breeze to more energetic ones that capture the growing excitement of the season as spring slowly unfolds, we hope you enjoy this wide-ranging selection.
